name: Fan-out Demo (Windows)
description: Showcases fan-out cluster mode on Windows: an IIS-like app tier with 4 first-class members (each monitored and operated independently) sitting between an aggregate-mode load balancer and an aggregate-mode SQL Server. All commands use file markers under %TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout\ so the demo runs without any real services. Quorum policy means the tier is RUNNING when at least 3/4 members are healthy (majority).

components.name: SQL Server Primary
components.start_cmd: if not exist "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" mkdir "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" && type nul > "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout\sqlserver.running"

components.name: IIS App Tier
components.start_cmd: if not exist "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" mkdir "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" && type nul > "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout\iis-default.running"

cluster_members.start_cmd_override: if not exist "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" mkdir "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" && type nul > "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout\iis-001.running"
if not exist "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" mkdir "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" && type nul > "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout\iis-002.running"
if not exist "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" mkdir "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" && type nul > "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout\iis-003.running"
if not exist "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" mkdir "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" && type nul > "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout\iis-004.running"

components.name: ARR Load Balancer
components.start_cmd: if not exist "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" mkdir "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout" && type nul > "%TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout\arr.running"

notes.demo_purpose: Same scenario as the Linux example (fan-out vs aggregate), but with Windows-style commands using cmd.exe `if exist` / `type nul` / `del` for file markers under %TEMP%.
notes.policy: quorum: the IIS tier is RUNNING when at least ceil(4/2)+1 = 3 members are RUNNING; with 1 or 2 RUNNING it is DEGRADED; with 0 RUNNING it is FAILED.
try_this: Start the app — all 4 IIS members come up, tier is RUNNING (4/4).
Stop one member (del %TEMP%\appcontrol-fanout\iis-002.running) — tier stays RUNNING (3/4 ≥ quorum).
Stop a second member — DEGRADED (2/4, below quorum).
Use the batch Start button to bring all members back.
notes.agent_setup: All members share `agent-win-primary` for the demo. In production each Windows host typically runs its own agent — populate the `agent` field on each member with its hostname.
notes.windows_quoting: The `del` commands trail with `& exit 0` because cmd.exe returns non-zero when no file matches; we want the stop command to be idempotent.
